faculty: Faculty of Health and Life Sciences
overview: The main aim to open this program is to make available skilled manpower by Food Engineering to available trained students in the areas of Engineering, Nutrition, Dietetics, Clinical Nutrition, Food Chemistry, Food Microbiology, Food Preservation, Food Packaging, Processing of Fruits, Vegetables, Cereals, Pulses, Oils, and their products. Besides this, practical training also being imparted in the areas of plant engineering, Clinical study, Food Analysis, Quality Tests and Food Evaluation.
waiver_info: Result-based waiver (Bachelor's), Waiver on SGPA (Semester result), Female quota, Need-based, Quota position, Physically challenged/specially-abled, tribal/ethnic group quota, Sibling/spouse and son/daughter of current students quota, Waiver for DIU alumni, Group admission quota, Freedom fighter quota
eligibility: General Student: Students having a minimum 2.5 GPA in both Secondary School Certificate (SSC) and Higher Secondary Certificate (HSC) with a minimum 2.5 GPA in Chemistry, Biology, and English may apply for admission. For Diploma Holder: Students having a minimum 2.5 GPA both in SSC and Diploma in Food, Nutrition & Food Engineering may apply for admission.
